title: lyrics.json — timed lyrics with confidence and honesty flags
description: Produced either by aligning a supplied lyrics file to the audio (mode 'aligned') or by transcribing the isolated vocal stem with Whisper (mode 'transcribed'). Uncertainty is explicit: per-word confidence, per-line flags, and untranscribed_regions listing sung passages the system could not read. Consumers must treat flagged content as suspect rather than assume completeness.

mode.description: aligned: text is the supplied lyrics file (display truth), timing from Whisper anchoring. transcribed: text AND timing from Whisper on the vocal stem — expect errors on effects-heavy or non-lexical vocals.

engine.description: What produced the timing (and, in transcribed mode, the text). Config-derived, hence deterministic — not run metadata.

lines.description: Sorted by start_seconds. In aligned mode, lines mirror the supplied file's line breaks; in transcribed mode, lines are Whisper segments.

flags.description: low_confidence: mean word confidence below threshold (config, default 0.5). possibly_non_lexical: hallucination heuristics fired (no_speech_prob / compression_ratio / dictionary hit rate) — text may be invented. overlapping_vocals: sustained dense vocal-stem energy suggests harmonies; words may be merged. long_word_duration: a word exceeds ~2.5 s (melisma); timings smeared. unaligned (aligned mode): line found no transcript anchor; timing absent-quality, taken from lrc hint or neighbor interpolation. timing_interpolated: word times inferred from neighbors rather than observed.

words.description: Sorted, monotone, within the line span. May be empty for an 'unaligned' line.

confidence.description: transcribed mode: Whisper word probability. aligned mode: token match score between supplied word and transcript anchor.

untranscribed_regions.description: Vocal-activity regions (from audio_features.json) with no word overlap — singing the system could not read. The honesty ledger: an LLM consumer should say 'vocals here, content unknown', never pretend silence.

vocal_activity_covered_ratio.description: Fraction of total vocal-activity time overlapped by at least one word.

lines_flagged_ratio.description: Fraction of lines carrying any flag. A quick trust score for the whole document.
